items.title: Vonn says surgery saved her from leg amputation
items.description: American skier Lindsey Vonn says she nearly lost her left leg following a frightening crash in the women's downhill at the Milan Cortina Olympics.

items.title: Prestianni banned over alleged Vini racist abuse
items.description: UEFA has provisionally suspended Benfica's Gianluca Prestianni for Wednesday's Champions League match against Real Madrid following the incident with ...

items.title: LeBron stumps for C's Brown in MVP conversation
items.description: After Jaylen Brown fueled the Celtics' win over the Lakers on Sunday, he received an MVP endorsement from the other side of the storied rivalry.

items.title: Pacers star Haliburton diagnosed with shingles
items.description: Pacers point guard Tyrese Haliburton was diagnosed with shingles and will be away from the team for a few weeks, coach Rick Carlisle said Sunday.

items.title: Kara Braxton, 2-time WNBA champion, dies at 43
items.description: Kara Braxton, a two-time WNBA champion with the Detroit Shock and former SEC Freshman of the Year at Georgia, has died at the age of 43.
